channel.title: Compaction on Loop & Retry
channel.description: Recent content in Compaction on Loop & Retry

item.title: Compaction is a lossy operation
item.description: When the context window fills up, the standard fix is to summarize the old turns and keep going. That summary is a lossy compression step, and the thing it silently drops is usually the one early constraint the agent needs a hundred turns later. Here’s why recency-based compaction fails, a simulation of how often the load-bearing fact survives, and the rule that actually protects it.
